import Brick.Widgets.Edit (Editor, editorText)
import Brick.Widgets.FileBrowser (FileBrowser)
import Brick.Widgets.List (List, list)
import Control.Concurrent (ThreadId)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (Async)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (TQueue, TVar, newTVarIO)
import Control.Lens (makeLenses)
import Data.Aeson (Value)
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.Maybe (listToMaybe)
import Data.Set (Set)
import qualified Data.Set as Set
import Data.Text (Text)
import Data.Time (UTCTime)
import qualified Data.Vector as Vector

import System.Agents.AgentTree (LoadedApiKeys, OSAgentNode, OSAgentTree)
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId, ConversationId (..))
import System.Agents.Media.Types (MediaAttachment)
import System.Agents.Runtime.Trace (Trace)
import System.Agents.Session.Base
import System.Agents.SessionStore (SessionStore)
import System.Agents.ToolRegistration (ToolRegistration)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Widget Names
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Widget names for the TUI focus ring and viewport management.
data WidgetName
    = -- | Agent list in the left sidebar
      AgentListWidget
    | -- | Agent information/details panel
      AgentInfoWidget
    | -- | Conversation list in the left sidebar
      ConversationListWidget
    | -- | Saved sessions list in the History tab
      SessionsListWidget
    | -- | Message editor input area
      MessageEditorWidget
    | -- | Main conversation display viewport
      ConversationViewWidget
    | -- | Session content display viewport
      SessionViewWidget
    | -- | For viewport scrolling during turn navigation
      TurnNavigationWidget
    | -- | For focusing the queued messages list
      QueuedMessageListWidget
    | -- | For the attachment list below the message editor
      AttachmentListWidget
    | -- | For the file path input dialog
      FilePathInputWidget
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Type alias for widget names.
type N = WidgetName

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tab Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Tabs available in the TUI interface.
data Tab
    = AgentsTab
    | ChatsTab
    | HistoryTab
    | HelpTab
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Status Message Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Severity level for status messages.
data StatusSeverity
    = StatusInfo
    | StatusWarning
    | StatusError
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | A status message with timestamp for auto-clear logic.
data StatusMessage = StatusMessage
    { statusText :: Text
    , statusSeverity :: StatusSeverity
    , statusTimestamp :: UTCTime
    }
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Turn Navigation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for turn-by-turn navigation
data TurnNavigationState = TurnNavigationState
    { _navSession :: Session
    -- ^ The session being navigated
    , _navSelectedTurnIndex :: Int
    -- ^ Currently selected turn index (0-based)
    , _navTotalTurns :: Int
    -- ^ Total number of turns for display
    }
    deriving (Show)

makeLenses ''TurnNavigationState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Attachment Dialog State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for the file attachment dialog
data AttachmentDialogState
    = -- | No dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogClosed
    | -- | Path input dialog is open (legacy text input)
      AttachmentDialogPathInput
    | -- | FileBrowser widget dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogFileBrowser
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Application Events
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Events that can be sent to the TUI application.
data AppEvent
    = AppEvent_Heartbeat
    | AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress ConversationId Session
    | AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput ConversationId
    | AppEvent_AgentTrace Trace
    | AppEvent_ShowStatus StatusSeverity Text
    | AppEvent_ClearStatus
    | -- ** Subcall Events for TUI visibility
      -- | A subcall conversation has started
      AppEvent_SubcallStarted
        { appSubcallParentId :: ConversationId
        , appSubcallId :: ConversationId
        , appSubcallAgentSlug :: Text
        , appSubcallDepth :: Int
        }
    | -- | A subcall has made progress
      AppEvent_SubcallProgress ConversationId Session
    | -- | A subcall has completed successfully
      AppEvent_SubcallCompleted ConversationId Text
    | -- | A subcall has failed
      AppEvent_SubcallFailed ConversationId Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Types (OS-Native)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | TUI Agent using OS-native structures.

This structure wraps an OSAgentNode for use in the TUI.
Tools are accessed directly from the node's tools TVar.
-}
data TuiAgent = TuiAgent
    { tuiAgentId :: AgentId
    -- ^ Unique identifier for this agent
    , tuiTree :: OSAgentTree
    -- ^ The agent's tree structure
    , tuiNode :: OSAgentNode
    -- ^ The specific node for this agent
    , tuiSlug :: Text
    -- ^ The agent's slug
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for TuiAgent.
instance Show TuiAgent where
    show agent =
        "TuiAgent {tuiAgentId = "
            ++ show agent.tuiAgentId
            ++ ", tuiSlug = "
            ++ show agent.tuiSlug
            ++ ", tuiTree = <OSAgentTree>, tuiNode = <OSAgentNode>}"

-- | Legacy accessor for backward compatibility.
agentTree :: TuiAgent -> OSAgentTree
agentTree = tuiTree

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Multi-Agent Coordination Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Role definition for agents in multi-agent conversations.
data AgentRole
    = -- | Coordinates other agents
      AgentRole_Orchestrator
    | -- | Specialized agent with a specific role description
      AgentRole_Specialist Text
    | -- | General worker agent
      AgentRole_Worker
    | -- | Observes but doesn't initiate
      AgentRole_Observer
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for an agent's role in multi-agent mode.
data AgentRoleConfig = AgentRoleConfig
    { arcAgentId :: AgentId
    , arcRole :: AgentRole
    , arcCanInitiate :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this agent can start new conversations
    , arcSubscribesTo :: [AgentId]
    -- ^ Agents this agent listens to for messages
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Strategy for coordinating multiple agents.
data CoordinationStrategy
    = -- | Each agent takes turns
      CoordinationStrategy_RoundRobin
    | -- | One agent orchestrates others
      CoordinationStrategy_Hierarchical AgentId
    | -- | Agents collaborate freely
      CoordinationStrategy_Collaborative
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for multi-agent conversations.
data MultiAgentConfig = MultiAgentConfig
    { maAgents :: [AgentRoleConfig]
    , maCoordinationStrategy :: CoordinationStrategy
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Message type for inter-agent communication.
data MessageType
    = -- | Direct message to specific agent
      MessageType_Direct
    | -- | Message to all subscribed agents
      MessageType_Broadcast
    | -- | Response to a previous message
      MessageType_Response
    | -- | Request for action from another agent
      MessageType_Request
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Message sent between agents.
data InterAgentMessage = InterAgentMessage
    { iamFrom :: AgentId
    , iamTo :: AgentId
    , iamType :: MessageType
    , iamContent :: Value
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Agent bus for inter-agent communication.
newtype AgentBus = AgentBus
    { busChannels :: TVar (Map AgentId (TQueue InterAgentMessage))
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Layout Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Layout modes for the TUI display.
data LayoutMode
    = -- | Single agent view (default)
      SingleAgent
    | -- | Split screen vertically
      SplitVertical
    | -- | Split screen horizontally
      SplitHorizontal
    | -- | Grid with rows and columns
      GridLayout Int Int
    | -- | Tabbed interface for switching between agents
      Tabbed
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | TUI configuration including layout and theme.
data TUIConfig = TUIConfig
    { tuiTheme :: Theme
    , tuiKeyBindings :: Map Key EventType
    , tuiLayout :: LayoutMode
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Theme configuration (placeholder - to be expanded).
newtype Theme = Theme {themeName :: Text}
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Key type for keybindings.
newtype Key = Key Text
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Event type for keybindings.
newtype EventType = EventType Text
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Status of a conversation regarding its execution state.
data ConversationStatus
    = -- | Conversation is currently running (agent is processing)
      ConversationStatus_Active
    | -- | Conversation is waiting for user input
      ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
    | -- | Conversation is paused (blocks step iteration until unpaused)
      ConversationStatus_Paused
    deriving (Show, Eq)

{- | A conversation with an agent.

Conversations can be either root-level user-initiated conversations
or subcalls (nested agent invocations). Subcall conversations have
additional metadata for TUI visibility and lineage tracking.
-}
data Conversation = Conversation
    { conversationId :: ConversationId
    , conversationAgent :: TuiAgent
    , conversationThreadId :: Maybe ThreadId
    -- ^ Nothing for restored conversations that haven't been continued yet
    , conversationSession :: Maybe Session
    , conversationName :: Text
    , conversationChan :: BChan (Maybe UserQuery)
    , conversationStatus :: ConversationStatus
    -- ^ Current status of the conversation
    , conversationOnProgress :: OnSessionProgress
    -- ^ Callback for session progress updates
    , conversationIsSubcall :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this is a subcall (nested agent invocation)
    , conversationParentId :: Maybe ConversationId
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID for subcalls (Nothing for root conversations)
    , conversationSubcallDepth :: Int
    -- ^ Subcall nesting depth (0 = root, 1+ = nested)
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for Conversation.
instance Show Conversation where
    show conv =
        "Conversation {conversationId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationId
            ++ ", conversationAgent = "
            ++ show conv.conversationAgent
            ++ ", conversationName = "
            ++ show conv.conversationName
            ++ ", conversationIsSubcall = "
            ++ show conv.conversationIsSubcall
            ++ ", conversationParentId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationParentId
            ++ ", ...}"

-- | Create a root-level conversation (not a subcall).
mkRootConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    Conversation
mkRootConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = False
        , conversationParentId = Nothing
        , conversationSubcallDepth = 0
        }

-- | Create a subcall conversation.
mkSubcallConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    ConversationId ->
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID
    Int ->
    -- ^ Subcall depth
    Conversation
mkSubcallConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress parentId depth =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = "↳ " <> convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = True
        , conversationParentId = Just parentId
        , conversationSubcallDepth = depth
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Auxiliary Task Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Auxiliary tasks running in the background (e.g., external viewers).
data AuxiliaryTask
    = -- | External markdown viewer task
      Viewer
        { viewerAsync :: Async ()
        , viewerConversationId :: ConversationId
        , viewerSessionId :: SessionId
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Session Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration for TUI sessions.
data SessionConfig = SessionConfig
    { sessionStore :: SessionStore
    -- ^ Storage for sessions
    , sessionApiKeys :: LoadedApiKeys
    -- ^ API keys for agents
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Core State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Core state shared across the TUI.

This is stored in a TVar for thread-safe access. It contains
mutable state that needs to be accessed from multiple threads.
-}
data Core = Core
    { coreConversations :: [Conversation]
    -- ^ Active conversations
    , coreAgentTools :: [(AgentId, [ToolRegistration])]
    -- ^ Tools per agent for display
    , coreBufferedMessages :: TVar (Map ConversationId [Text])
    -- ^ Buffered messages per conversation (queued while agent is processing)
    , corePausedConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of paused conversation IDs
    }

makeLenses ''Core

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- UI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | UI-specific state for the TUI.

This contains all the visual/interaction state that doesn't need
to be thread-safe and is only accessed from the UI thread.
-}
data UIState = UIState
    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
    -- ^ Focus ring for widget navigation
    , _currentTab :: Tab
    -- ^ Currently active tab
    , _helpContent :: [Text]
    -- ^ Help text content lines
    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for file path input
    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Selected attachment index
    , _agentList :: List WidgetName TuiAgent
    -- ^ List widget for agents
    , _conversationList :: List WidgetName Conversation
    -- ^ List widget for conversations
    , _sessionList :: List WidgetName Session
    -- ^ List widget for saved sessions
    , _messageEditor :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for message input
    , _selectedAgentInfo :: Maybe TuiAgent
    -- ^ Currently selected agent for display
    , _statusMessage :: Maybe StatusMessage
    -- ^ Current status message (if any)
    , _zoomed :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether zoom mode is active
    , _quitConfirmationPending :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether quit confirmation is pending
    , _unreadConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of conversations with unread messages
    , _fileBrowser :: Maybe (FileBrowser WidgetName)
    -- ^ File browser widget for attachments
    , _auxiliaryTasks :: [AuxiliaryTask]
    -- ^ Background tasks (e.g., external viewers)
    , _uiBufferedMessages :: Map ConversationId [Text]
    -- ^ Copy of buffered messages from Core for UI rendering
    }

makeLenses ''UIState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Complete TUI state combining core and UI components.
data TuiState = TuiState
    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
    -- ^ Thread-safe core state
    , _tuiUI :: UIState
    -- ^ UI-specific state
    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
    -- ^ Channel for application events
    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
    -- ^ Session configuration
    }

makeLenses ''TuiState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize UI state with default values.
initUIState :: [Text] -> [TuiAgent] -> UIState
initUIState helpContent agents =
    UIState
        { _uiFocusRing = focusRing [AgentListWidget]
        , _currentTab = AgentsTab
        , _helpContent = helpContent
        , _turnNavigation = Nothing
        , _queuedMessagesFocus = Nothing
        , _attachedFiles = Map.empty
        , _attachmentDialogState = AttachmentDialogClosed
        , _filePathInput = editorText FilePathInputWidget (Just 1) ""
        , _selectedAttachmentIndex = Nothing
        , _agentList = list AgentListWidget (Vector.fromList agents) 1
        , _conversationList = list ConversationListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _sessionList = list SessionsListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _messageEditor = editorText MessageEditorWidget Nothing ""
        , _selectedAgentInfo = listToMaybe agents
        , _statusMessage = Nothing
        , _zoomed = False
        , _quitConfirmationPending = False
        , _unreadConversations = Set.empty
        , _fileBrowser = Nothing
        , _auxiliaryTasks = []
        , _uiBufferedMessages = Map.empty
        }

-- | Initialize core state.
initCore :: IO Core
initCore = do
    bufferedVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure
        Core
            { coreConversations = []
            , coreAgentTools = []
            , coreBufferedMessages = bufferedVar
            , corePausedConversations = Set.empty
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Update a conversation's session in a list of conversations.
updateConversationSession :: ConversationId -> Session -> [Conversation] -> [Conversation]
updateConversationSession targetConvId newSession =
    map
        ( \conv ->
            if conversationId conv == targetConvId
                then conv{conversationSession = Just newSession}
                else conv
        )

{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
{-# LANGUAGE TemplateHaskell #-}

-- | Core types and data structures for the TUI application.
module System.Agents.TUI.Types where

import Brick.BChan (BChan)
import Brick.Focus (FocusRing, focusRing)
import Brick.Widgets.Edit (Editor, editorText)
import Brick.Widgets.FileBrowser (FileBrowser)
import Brick.Widgets.List (List, list)
import Control.Concurrent (ThreadId)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (Async)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (TQueue, TVar, newTVarIO)
import Control.Lens (makeLenses)
import Data.Aeson (Value)
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.Maybe (listToMaybe)
import Data.Set (Set)
import qualified Data.Set as Set
import Data.Text (Text)
import Data.Time (UTCTime)
import qualified Data.Vector as Vector

import System.Agents.AgentTree (LoadedApiKeys, OSAgentNode, OSAgentTree)
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId, ConversationId (..))
import System.Agents.Media.Types (MediaAttachment)
import System.Agents.Runtime.Trace (Trace)
import System.Agents.Session.Base
import System.Agents.SessionStore (SessionStore)
import System.Agents.ToolRegistration (ToolRegistration)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Widget Names
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Widget names for the TUI focus ring and viewport management.
data WidgetName
    = -- | Agent list in the left sidebar
      AgentListWidget
    | -- | Agent information/details panel
      AgentInfoWidget
    | -- | Conversation list in the left sidebar
      ConversationListWidget
    | -- | Saved sessions list in the History tab
      SessionsListWidget
    | -- | Message editor input area
      MessageEditorWidget
    | -- | Main conversation display viewport
      ConversationViewWidget
    | -- | Session content display viewport
      SessionViewWidget
    | -- | For viewport scrolling during turn navigation
      TurnNavigationWidget
    | -- | For focusing the queued messages list
      QueuedMessageListWidget
    | -- | For the attachment list below the message editor
      AttachmentListWidget
    | -- | For the file path input dialog
      FilePathInputWidget
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Type alias for widget names.
type N = WidgetName

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tab Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Tabs available in the TUI interface.
data Tab
    = AgentsTab
    | ChatsTab
    | HistoryTab
    | HelpTab
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Status Message Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Severity level for status messages.
data StatusSeverity
    = StatusInfo
    | StatusWarning
    | StatusError
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | A status message with timestamp for auto-clear logic.
data StatusMessage = StatusMessage
    { statusText :: Text
    , statusSeverity :: StatusSeverity
    , statusTimestamp :: UTCTime
    }
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Turn Navigation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for turn-by-turn navigation
data TurnNavigationState = TurnNavigationState
    { _navSession :: Session
    -- ^ The session being navigated
    , _navSelectedTurnIndex :: Int
    -- ^ Currently selected turn index (0-based)
    , _navTotalTurns :: Int
    -- ^ Total number of turns for display
    }
    deriving (Show)

makeLenses ''TurnNavigationState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Attachment Dialog State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for the file attachment dialog
data AttachmentDialogState
    = -- | No dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogClosed
    | -- | Path input dialog is open (legacy text input)
      AttachmentDialogPathInput
    | -- | FileBrowser widget dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogFileBrowser
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Application Events
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Events that can be sent to the TUI application.

agentTree :: TuiAgent -> OSAgentTree
agentTree = tuiTree

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    | -- | Specialized agent with a specific role description

    | -- | General worker agent
      AgentRole_Worker
    | -- | Observes but doesn't initiate

    { arcAgentId :: AgentId

-- | Strategy for coordinating multiple agents.
data CoordinationStrategy
    = -- | Each agent takes turns
      CoordinationStrategy_RoundRobin
    | -- | One agent orchestrates others

-- | Message type for inter-agent communication.

      MessageType_Broadcast
    | -- | Response to a previous message
      MessageType_Response
    | -- | Request for action from another agent

    deriving (Show, Eq)

    { iamFrom :: AgentId

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    = -- | Conversation is currently running (agent is processing)

{- | A conversation with an agent.

Conversations can be either root-level user-initiated conversations
or subcalls (nested agent invocations). Subcall conversations have
additional metadata for TUI visibility and lineage tracking.
-}
data Conversation = Conversation
    { conversationId :: ConversationId
    , conversationAgent :: TuiAgent
    , conversationThreadId :: Maybe ThreadId
    -- ^ Nothing for restored conversations that haven't been continued yet
    , conversationSession :: Maybe Session
    , conversationName :: Text
    , conversationChan :: BChan (Maybe UserQuery)
    , conversationStatus :: ConversationStatus
    -- ^ Current status of the conversation
    , conversationOnProgress :: OnSessionProgress
    -- ^ Callback for session progress updates
    , conversationIsSubcall :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this is a subcall (nested agent invocation)
    , conversationParentId :: Maybe ConversationId
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID for subcalls (Nothing for root conversations)
    , conversationSubcallDepth :: Int
    -- ^ Subcall nesting depth (0 = root, 1+ = nested)
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for Conversation.
instance Show Conversation where
    show conv =
        "Conversation {conversationId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationId
            ++ ", conversationAgent = "
            ++ show conv.conversationAgent
            ++ ", conversationName = "
            ++ show conv.conversationName
            ++ ", conversationIsSubcall = "
            ++ show conv.conversationIsSubcall
            ++ ", conversationParentId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationParentId
            ++ ", ...}"

-- | Create a root-level conversation (not a subcall).
mkRootConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    Conversation
mkRootConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = False
        , conversationParentId = Nothing
        , conversationSubcallDepth = 0
        }

-- | Create a subcall conversation.
mkSubcallConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    ConversationId ->
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID
    Int ->
    -- ^ Subcall depth
    Conversation
mkSubcallConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress parentId depth =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = "↳ " <> convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = True
        , conversationParentId = Just parentId
        , conversationSubcallDepth = depth
        }

This is stored in a TVar for thread-safe access. It contains

makeLenses ''Core

This contains all the visual/interaction state that doesn't need

data UIState = UIState
    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
    -- ^ Focus ring for widget navigation
    , _currentTab :: Tab
    -- ^ Currently active tab
    , _helpContent :: [Text]
    -- ^ Help text content lines
    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for file path input
    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Selected attachment index
    , _agentList :: List WidgetName TuiAgent
    -- ^ List widget for agents
    , _conversationList :: List WidgetName Conversation
    -- ^ List widget for conversations
    , _sessionList :: List WidgetName Session
    -- ^ List widget for saved sessions
    , _messageEditor :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for message input
    , _selectedAgentInfo :: Maybe TuiAgent
    -- ^ Currently selected agent for display
    , _statusMessage :: Maybe StatusMessage
    -- ^ Current status message (if any)
    , _zoomed :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether zoom mode is active
    , _quitConfirmationPending :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether quit confirmation is pending
    , _unreadConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of conversations with unread messages
    , _fileBrowser :: Maybe (FileBrowser WidgetName)
    -- ^ File browser widget for attachments
    , _auxiliaryTasks :: [AuxiliaryTask]
    -- ^ Background tasks (e.g., external viewers)
    , _uiBufferedMessages :: Map ConversationId [Text]
    -- ^ Copy of buffered messages from Core for UI rendering
    }

makeLenses ''UIState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Complete TUI state combining core and UI components.
data TuiState = TuiState
    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
    -- ^ Thread-safe core state
    , _tuiUI :: UIState
    -- ^ UI-specific state
    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
    -- ^ Channel for application events
    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
    -- ^ Session configuration
    }

makeLenses ''TuiState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize UI state with default values.
initUIState :: [Text] -> [TuiAgent] -> UIState
initUIState helpContent agents =
    UIState
        { _uiFocusRing = focusRing [AgentListWidget]
        , _currentTab = AgentsTab
        , _helpContent = helpContent
        , _turnNavigation = Nothing
        , _queuedMessagesFocus = Nothing
        , _attachedFiles = Map.empty
        , _attachmentDialogState = AttachmentDialogClosed
        , _filePathInput = editorText FilePathInputWidget (Just 1) ""
        , _selectedAttachmentIndex = Nothing
        , _agentList = list AgentListWidget (Vector.fromList agents) 1
        , _conversationList = list ConversationListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _sessionList = list SessionsListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _messageEditor = editorText MessageEditorWidget Nothing ""
        , _selectedAgentInfo = listToMaybe agents
        , _statusMessage = Nothing
        , _zoomed = False
        , _quitConfirmationPending = False
        , _unreadConversations = Set.empty
        , _fileBrowser = Nothing
        , _auxiliaryTasks = []
        , _uiBufferedMessages = Map.empty
        }

-- | Initialize core state.
initCore :: IO Core
initCore = do
    bufferedVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure
        Core
            { coreConversations = []
            , coreAgentTools = []
            , coreBufferedMessages = bufferedVar
            , corePausedConversations = Set.empty
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Update a conversation's session in a list of conversations.
updateConversationSession :: ConversationId -> Session -> [Conversation] -> [Conversation]
updateConversationSession targetConvId newSession =
    map
        ( \conv ->
            if conversationId conv == targetConvId
                then conv{conversationSession = Just newSession}
                else conv
        )

    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
    -- ^ Focus ring for widget navigation
    , _currentTab :: Tab
    -- ^ Currently active tab
    , _helpContent :: [Text]
    -- ^ Help text content lines
    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for file path input
    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Selected attachment index
    , _agentList :: List WidgetName TuiAgent
    -- ^ List widget for agents
    , _conversationList :: List WidgetName Conversation
    -- ^ List widget for conversations
    , _sessionList :: List WidgetName Session
    -- ^ List widget for saved sessions
    , _messageEditor :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for message input
    , _selectedAgentInfo :: Maybe TuiAgent
    -- ^ Currently selected agent for display
    , _statusMessage :: Maybe StatusMessage
    -- ^ Current status message (if any)
    , _zoomed :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether zoom mode is active
    , _quitConfirmationPending :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether quit confirmation is pending
    , _unreadConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of conversations with unread messages
    , _fileBrowser :: Maybe (FileBrowser WidgetName)
    -- ^ File browser widget for attachments
    , _auxiliaryTasks :: [AuxiliaryTask]
    -- ^ Background tasks (e.g., external viewers)
    , _uiBufferedMessages :: Map ConversationId [Text]
    -- ^ Copy of buffered messages from Core for UI rendering
    }

makeLenses ''UIState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Complete TUI state combining core and UI components.
data TuiState = TuiState
    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
    -- ^ Thread-safe core state
    , _tuiUI :: UIState
    -- ^ UI-specific state
    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
    -- ^ Channel for application events
    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
    -- ^ Session configuration
    }

makeLenses ''TuiState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize UI state with default values.
initUIState :: [Text] -> [TuiAgent] -> UIState
initUIState helpContent agents =
    UIState
        { _uiFocusRing = focusRing [AgentListWidget]
        , _currentTab = AgentsTab
        , _helpContent = helpContent
        , _turnNavigation = Nothing
        , _queuedMessagesFocus = Nothing
        , _attachedFiles = Map.empty
        , _attachmentDialogState = AttachmentDialogClosed
        , _filePathInput = editorText FilePathInputWidget (Just 1) ""
        , _selectedAttachmentIndex = Nothing
        , _agentList = list AgentListWidget (Vector.fromList agents) 1
        , _conversationList = list ConversationListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _sessionList = list SessionsListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _messageEditor = editorText MessageEditorWidget Nothing ""
        , _selectedAgentInfo = listToMaybe agents
        , _statusMessage = Nothing
        , _zoomed = False
        , _quitConfirmationPending = False
        , _unreadConversations = Set.empty
        , _fileBrowser = Nothing
        , _auxiliaryTasks = []
        , _uiBufferedMessages = Map.empty
        }

-- | Initialize core state.
initCore :: IO Core
initCore = do
    bufferedVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure
        Core
            { coreConversations = []
            , coreAgentTools = []
            , coreBufferedMessages = bufferedVar
            , corePausedConversations = Set.empty
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Update a conversation's session in a list of conversations.
updateConversationSession :: ConversationId -> Session -> [Conversation] -> [Conversation]
updateConversationSession targetConvId newSession =
    map
        ( \conv ->
            if conversationId conv == targetConvId
                then conv{conversationSession = Just newSession}
                else conv
        )

content.content:
550	### Turn Navigation Types
551	
552	```haskell
553	-- | State for turn-by-turn navigation
554	data TurnNavigationState = TurnNavigationState
555	    { _navSession :: Session
556	    -- ^ The session being navigated
557	    , _navSelectedTurnIndex :: Int
558	    -- ^ Currently selected turn index (0-based)
559	    , _navTotalTurns :: Int
560	    -- ^ Total number of turns for display
561	    }
562	
563	-- | Widget name for turn navigation viewport
564	data WidgetName
565	    = ...
566	    | TurnNavigationWidget
567	    -- ^ For viewport scrolling during turn navigation
568	```
569	
570	## Message Queue Management
571	
572	When a conversation is paused, you can manage queued messages - messages typed while the agent was processing.
573	
574	### Queue Management UI
575	
576	When paused with queued messages, the Chats tab shows a queue management panel:
577	
578	```
579	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
580	│ Message                                                      │
581	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
582	│ > User's typed message...                                   │
583	│                                                             │
584	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
585	│ Queued Messages (2) - Ctrl+D: clear  Del: delete selected │
586	│ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
587	│ │ ▶ First queued message text...                          │ │
588	│ │   Second queued message that is longer...               │ │
589	│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
590	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
591	│ Conversation                                                 │
592	│ ...existing conversation content...                          │
593	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
594	```
595	
596	### Queue Management Controls
597	
598	| Key | Action |
599	|-----|--------|
600	| `Ctrl+D` | Clear all queued messages |
601	| `Del` / `Backspace` | Delete selected queued message |
602	| `Up` | Select previous message |
603	| `Down` | Select next message |
604	
605	### Activation
606	
607	Queue management is only available when:
608	- The conversation status is `ConversationStatus_Paused`
609	- There are queued messages in the buffer
610	
611	To pause/unpause a conversation, press `Ctrl+E`.
612	
613	### Queue State
614	
615	```haskell
616	data UIState = UIState
617	    { ...
618	    , _uiBufferedMessages :: Map ConversationId [Text]
619	    -- ^ Copy of buffered messages from Core for UI rendering
620	    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
621	    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message (Nothing = none selected)
622	    }
623	
624	-- The Core also maintains the source of truth
625	data Core = Core
626	    { ...
627	    , coreBufferedMessages :: TVar (Map ConversationId [Text])
628	    -- ^ Buffered messages per conversation
629	    , corePausedConversations :: Set ConversationId
630	    -- ^ Set of paused conversation IDs
631	    }
632	```
633	
634	## Keyboard Shortcuts
635	
636	### Navigation
637	
638	| Key | Action |
639	|-----|--------|
640	| `Tab` | Cycle focus forward through widgets |
641	| `Shift+Tab` | Cycle focus backward through widgets |
642	| `Ctrl+Z` | Toggle zoom mode for current widget |
643	
644	### Tabs
645	
646	| Key | Action |
647	|-----|--------|
648	| `Ctrl+[` | Switch to previous tab |
649	| `Ctrl+]` | Switch to next tab |
650

441	    resetQuitConfirmation
442	    openFilePathDialog
443	
444	-- Handle Ctrl+Shift+F to clear all attachments
445	VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'F') [Vty.MCtrl, Vty.MShift]) -> do
446	    resetQuitConfirmation
447	    handleClearAllAttachments
448	
449	-- Handle clipboard paste
450	VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'v') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
451	    resetQuitConfirmation
452	    handleClipboardPaste tracer
453	```
454	
455	### Clipboard Paste Handler
456	
457	```haskell
458	handleClipboardPaste :: Tracer IO Trace -> EventM N TuiState ()
459	handleClipboardPaste _tracer = do
460	    hasSupport <- liftIO hasClipboardSupport
461	    if not hasSupport
462	        then showStatus StatusError "Clipboard not available - install xclip, wl-clipboard, or pbpaste"
463	        else do
464	            mContent <- liftIO detectClipboardContent
465	            case mContent of
466	                Nothing ->
467	                    showStatus StatusWarning "Clipboard is empty or inaccessible"
468	                Just content -> do
469	                    action <- liftIO $ analyzeContent content
470	                    case action of
471	                        IgnoreContent ->
472	                            showStatus StatusWarning "No attachable content in clipboard"
473	                        PasteAsText text -> do
474	                            -- Insert text into editor
475	                            editorContents <- use (tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL)
476	                            let newContents = TextZipper.insertMany text editorContents
477	                            tuiUI . messageEditor . editContentsL .= newContents
478	                            showStatus StatusInfo "Text pasted from clipboard"
479	                        AttachAsMedia attachment -> do
480	                            -- Attach to current conversation
481	                            mConv <- getFocusedConversation
482	                            case mConv of
483	                                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
484	                                Just conv -> do
485	                                    let convId = conversationId conv
486	                                    tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insertWith (\new old -> old ++ new) convId [attachment]
487	                                    let filename = maybe "unnamed" id attachment.mediaFilename
488	                                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Attached from clipboard: " <> filename
489	                        AttachMultipleFiles attachments -> do
490	                            -- Attach multiple files
491	                            mConv <- getFocusedConversation
492	                            case mConv of
493	                                Nothing -> showStatus StatusError "No conversation selected"
494	                                Just conv -> do
495	                                    let convId = conversationId conv
496	                                    tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insertWith (\new old -> old ++ new) convId attachments
497	                                    showStatus StatusInfo $ "Attached " <> Text.pack (show $ length attachments) <> " files from clipboard"
498	```
499	
500	## Turn Navigation
501	
502	Turn navigation allows you to browse through conversation history turn-by-turn and fork new conversations from any point.
503	
504	### Entering Navigation Mode
505	
506	Press `Enter` when focused on the Conversation view or Session view to enter turn navigation mode:
507	
508	```
509	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
510	│ Conversation - Turn Navigation (3/8) [Enter:exit F:fork]    │
511	│ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
512	│ │ -----------------------                                 │ │
513	│ │▶ < What is the best approach for...      ← SELECTED    │ │
514	│ │  + ...                                                  │ │
515	│ │                                                         │ │
516	│ │ -----------------------                                 │ │
517	│ │  < You could consider using...                          │ │
518	│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
519	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
520	```
521	
522	### Navigation Controls
523	
524	| Key | Action |
525	|-----|--------|
526	| `Up` | Navigate to earlier turn |
527	| `Down` | Navigate to later turn |
528	| `F` | Fork conversation at selected turn |
529	| `Enter` | Exit navigation mode |
530	| `Esc` | Exit navigation mode |
531	
532	### Forking Conversations
533	
534	Forking creates a new conversation starting from the selected turn, preserving only the turns before it:
535	
536	```
537	Turn 0: User - "Hello!"
538	Turn 1: Assistant - "Hi there!"
539	Turn 2: User - "How do I..." ← Selected for fork
540	Turn 3: Assistant - "You can..."
541	
542	Forking at Turn 2 creates new conversation with:
543	Turn 0: User - "Hello!"
544	Turn 1: Assistant - "Hi there!"
545	(New conversation starts here)
546	```
547	
548	The original session remains untouched. The forked session has `forkedFromSessionId` set to the original session's ID.
549	
550	### Turn Navigation Types

290	1. Check for image data (via magic bytes: PNG `[0m[32m\x89PNG`, JPEG `[0m[32m\xFF\xD8\xFF`, GIF `GIF87a/GIF89a`, WebP `RIFF`)
291	2. Check for file paths (valid paths that exist)
292	3. Check for multiple file paths (one per line)
293	4. Fall back to plain text
294	
295	### Clipboard Module
296	
297	```haskell
298	-- System.Agents.TUI.Clipboard
299	
300	-- Detect available backend
301	detectBackend :: IO ClipboardBackend
302	
303	-- Read clipboard content
304	readClipboard :: ClipboardBackend -> IO (Maybe ByteString)
305	
306	-- Detect content type
307	detectClipboardContent :: IO (Maybe ClipboardContent)
308	
309	-- Analyze and convert to action
310	analyzeContent :: ClipboardContent -> IO ContentAction
311	
312	data ContentAction
313	    = AttachAsMedia MediaAttachment
314	    | PasteAsText Text
315	    | AttachMultipleFiles [MediaAttachment]
316	    | IgnoreContent
317	```
318	
319	### Image Pasting from Clipboard
320	
321	When an image is pasted from clipboard:
322	
323	1. Detect image format from magic bytes
324	2. Save to temporary file with appropriate extension
325	3. Create `MediaAttachment` with detected MIME type
326	4. Attach to current conversation
327	5. Show status: "Attached from clipboard: image.png"
328	
329	**Temporary file location:** `$TMPDIR/agents-exe-clipboard/clipboard-*.png`
330	
331	**Size limit:** 50MB for clipboard images
332	
333	### File Drop Support (Terminal Protocols)
334	
335	The clipboard module also supports file drop events from modern terminals:
336	
337	| Protocol | Terminal | Support |
338	|----------|----------|---------|
339	| iTerm2 File Drop | iTerm2 (macOS) | ✅ Supported |
340	| Kitty Graphics | Kitty | ✅ Supported |
341	| OSC 52 | Various | ✅ Read support |
342	
343	## Rendering
344	
345	### Tab Bar Rendering
346	
347	```haskell
348	-- TUI.Render
349	renderTabBar :: Tab -> Widget N
350	renderTabBar activeTab =
351	    let tabs = [AgentsTab, ChatsTab, HistoryTab, HelpTab]
352	        renderTab tab =
353	            let tabName = case tab of
354	                    AgentsTab -> " Agents "
355	                    ChatsTab -> " Chats "
356	                    HistoryTab -> " History "
357	                    HelpTab -> " Help "
358	                tabAttr = if tab == activeTab 
359	                          then activeTabAttr 
360	                          else inactiveTabAttr
361	             in withAttr tabAttr $ txt tabName
362	     in hBox (intersperse separator $ map renderTab tabs)
363	```
364	
365	### Tab-Specific Content
366	
367	```haskell
368	render_contentArea :: TuiState -> Widget N
369	render_contentArea st =
370	    case st ^. tuiUI . currentTab of
371	        AgentsTab -> renderAgentsTab st
372	        ChatsTab -> renderChatsTab st
373	        HistoryTab -> renderHistoryTab st
374	        HelpTab -> renderHelpTab st
375	```
376	
377	### Attachment List Rendering
378	
379	```haskell
380	render_attachmentPanel :: TuiState -> [MediaAttachment] -> Widget N
381	render_attachmentPanel st attachments =
382	    borderWithFocus
383	        st
384	        AttachmentListWidget
385	        (" Attachments (" <> Text.pack (show $ length attachments) <> ") ")
386	        $ vBox
387	            [ txt "Del/Backspace: remove | Ctrl+Shift+F: clear all"
388	            , txt ""
389	            , vBox $ zipWith (render_attachment_item selectedIdx) [0 ..] attachments
390	            ]
391	
392	render_attachment_item :: Maybe Int -> Int -> MediaAttachment -> Widget N
393	render_attachment_item selectedIdx idx att =
394	    let isSelected = selectedIdx == Just idx
395	        marker = if isSelected then "▶ " else "  "
396	        filename = maybe "unnamed" id att.mediaFilename
397	        mimeType = att.mediaMimeType
398	        sizeStr = formatAttachmentSize att.mediaBase64Data
399	     in hBox
400	         [ txt marker

content.content:
100	
101	### State Management
102	
103	```haskell
104	-- TUI.Types
105	data Tab
106	    = AgentsTab
107	    | ChatsTab
108	    | HistoryTab
109	    | HelpTab
110	    deriving (Show, Eq)
111	
112	data UIState = UIState
113	    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
114	    , _currentTab :: Tab           -- Current active tab
115	    , _helpContent :: [Text]       -- Help text lines
116	    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
117	    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
118	    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
119	    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
120	    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
121	    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
122	    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
123	    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
124	    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
125	    -- ^ Editor for file path input
126	    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
127	    -- ^ Selected attachment index
128	    , ...
129	    }
130	
131	data TUIState = TUIState
132	    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
133	    , _tuiUI :: UIState
134	    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
135	    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
136	    }
137	```
138	
139	## File Attachments
140	
141	The TUI supports attaching files to messages for multi-modal LLM interactions.
142	
143	### Attaching Files
144	
145	**Via File Path Input:**
146	- Press `Ctrl+F` to open the file path input dialog
147	- Type or paste the absolute path to the file
148	- Press `Enter` to attach, `Esc` to cancel
149	
150	**Supported file path formats:**
151	```
152	/path/to/image.png                    # Auto-detect MIME type
153	image/png;/path/to/image.png          # Explicit MIME type
154	```
155	
156	### Attachment Display
157	
158	Attached files are displayed below the message editor:
159	
160	```
161	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
162	│ Message [2 attachments]                                     │
163	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
164	│ > Your message here...                                      │
165	│                                                             │
166	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
167	│ Attachments (2) - Del/Backspace: remove | Ctrl+Shift+F: clear all│
168	│   📎 screenshot.png (image/png, 245KB)                     │
169	│ ▶ 📎 report.pdf (application/pdf, 1.2MB)                   │
170	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
171	```
172	
173	### Managing Attachments
174	
175	| Key | Action |
176	|-----|--------|
177	| `Ctrl+F` | Open file path input dialog |
178	| `Ctrl+Shift+F` | Clear all attachments |
179	| `Del` / `Backspace` | Remove selected attachment |
180	| `Up` / `Down` | Select attachment (when focus is on attachment list) |
181	
182	### Supported File Types
183	
184	The TUI can attach any file type. MIME type detection is automatic based on file extension:
185	
186	| Category | Extensions | MIME Types |
187	|----------|------------|------------|
188	| **Images** | `.png`, `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.gif`, `.webp`, `.svg` | `image/png`, `image/jpeg`, `image/gif`, `image/webp`, `image/svg+xml` |
189	| **Documents** | `.pdf`, `.txt`, `.md`, `.json`, `.xml` | `application/pdf`, `text/plain`, `text/markdown`, `application/json`, `application/xml` |
190	| **Audio** | `.mp3`, `.wav`, `.ogg`, `.aac`, `.flac` | `audio/mp3`, `audio/wav`, `audio/ogg`, `audio/aac`, `audio/flac` |
191	| **Video** | `.mp4`, `.webm`, `.mov`, `.avi` | `video/mp4`, `video/webm`, `video/quicktime`, `video/avi` |
192	| **Archives** | `.zip` | `application/zip` |
193	
194	**Size Limit:** 50MB per file
195	
196	### Attachment State
197	
198	```haskell
199	-- Attachments are stored per conversation
200	type AttachedFiles = Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
201	
202	data MediaAttachment = MediaAttachment
203	    { mediaMimeType :: Text        -- e.g., "image/png"
204	    , mediaBase64Data :: Text      -- Base64-encoded content
205	    , mediaFilename :: Maybe Text  -- Original filename
206	    }
207	
208	-- Dialog state for file attachment
209	data AttachmentDialogState
210	    = AttachmentDialogClosed
211	    | AttachmentDialogPathInput
212	```
213	
214	### Attachment Flow
215	
216	```
217	User presses Ctrl+F
218	       │
219	       ▼
220	┌──────────────────┐
221	│ Open path dialog │
222	│ (text input)     │
223	└────────┬─────────┘
224	         │
225	         ▼
226	┌──────────────────┐
227	│ User enters path │
228	│ Presses Enter    │
229	└────────┬─────────┘
230	         │
231	         ▼
232	┌──────────────────┐
233	│ Load file        │
234	│ Detect MIME type │
235	│ Base64 encode    │
236	└────────┬─────────┘
237	         │
238	         ▼
239	┌──────────────────┐
240	│ Add to           │
241	│ attachedFiles    │
242	│ map              │
243	└────────┬─────────┘
244	         │
245	         ▼
246	┌──────────────────┐
247	│ Render in        │
248	│ attachment list  │
249	└──────────────────┘
250	```

content.content:
1	# Terminal UI (TUI)
2	
3	The Terminal UI provides an interactive, real-time interface for agent conversations with support for multiple agents, streaming responses, visual feedback, file attachments, clipboard integration, and a tabbed interface for organizing different views.
4	
5	## Overview
6	
7	```
8	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
9	│ Agents │ Chats │ History │ Help                                  │
10	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
11	│  Agents                                                         │
12	│  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │
13	│  file-assistant                                                 │
14	│  code-reviewer                                                  │
15	│  documenter                                                     │
16	│                                                                 │
17	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
18	│                                                                 │
19	│  # Slug: file-assistant                                         │
20	│  # Announce: A helpful file assistant                           │
21	│  # Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514                              │
22	│                                                                 │
23	│  # Tools:                                                       │
24	│  - [A] read_file                                               │
25	│  - [A] write_file                                              │
26	│  - [D:bash] bash_command                                       │
27	│                                                                 │
28	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
29	│ [Tab] Switch  [Enter] Send  [Ctrl+C] Quit  [Ctrl+[|]] Prev/Next │
30	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
31	```
32	
33	## Tabbed Interface
34	
35	The TUI features a tabbed interface with four main tabs:
36	
37	| Tab | Description | Content |
38	|-----|-------------|---------|
39	| **Agents** | Browse and select agents | Agent list and detailed agent information |
40	| **Chats** | Active conversations | Conversation list and message interface |
41	| **History** | Past sessions | Session list and history view |
42	| **Help** | Keyboard shortcuts | Command reference and key bindings |
43	
44	### Tab Navigation
45	
46	| Key | Action |
47	|-----|--------|
48	| `Ctrl+[` | Switch to previous tab |
49	| `Ctrl+]` | Switch to next tab |
50	
51	### Agents Tab
52	
53	The Agents tab displays:
54	- **Left sidebar**: List of available agents
55	- **Main area**: Detailed agent information including:
56	  - Slug and announce text
57	  - Model name
58	  - Tools with activation status
59	  - System prompt
60	
61	### Chats Tab
62	
63	The Chats tab is for active conversations:
64	- **Left sidebar**: List of ongoing conversations with status indicators:
65	  - `⟳` - Active (agent is processing)
66	  - `●` - Waiting for input (unread)
67	  - `⏸` - Paused
68	  - `📎` - Has file attachments
69	- **Main area**: Message editor, attachment list, queued messages (when paused), and conversation history
70	
71	### History Tab
72	
73	The History tab shows saved sessions:
74	- **Left sidebar**: List of saved sessions from the session store
75	- **Main area**: Session content viewer with search functionality
76	
77	### Help Tab
78	
79	The Help tab displays keyboard shortcuts and command reference for quick access to all TUI functionality.
80	
81	## Architecture
82	
83	### Component Structure
84	
85	```
86	┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
87	│                         TUI.Core                                │
88	├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
89	│                                                                 │
90	│  ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐      │
91	│  │   TUI.Types  │───>│  TUI.Render  │───>│  TUI.Event   │      │
92	│  │   (state)    │    │  (display)   │    │  (input)     │      │
93	│  └──────────────┘    └──────────────┘    └──────────────┘      │
94	│         ▲                                            │          │
95	│         └────────────────────────────────────────────┘          │
96	│                      (event loop)                               │
97	│                                                                 │
98	└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
99	```
100	
101	### State Management
102	
103	```haskell
104	-- TUI.Types
105	data Tab
106	    = AgentsTab
107	    | ChatsTab
108	    | HistoryTab
109	    | HelpTab
110	    deriving (Show, Eq)
111	
112	data UIState = UIState
113	    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
114	    , _currentTab :: Tab           -- Current active tab
115	    , _helpContent :: [Text]       -- Help text lines
116	    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
117	    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
118	    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
119	    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
120	    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
121	    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
122	    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
123	    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
124	    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
125	    -- ^ Editor for file path input
126	    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
127	    -- ^ Selected attachment index
128	    , ...
129	    }
130	
131	data TUIState = TUIState
132	    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
133	    , _tuiUI :: UIState
134	    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
135	    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
136	    }
137	```
138	
139	## File Attachments
140	
141	The TUI supports attaching files to messages for multi-modal LLM interactions.
142	
143	### Attaching Files
144	
145	**Via File Path Input:**
146	- Press `Ctrl+F` to open the file path input dialog
147	- Type or paste the absolute path to the file
148	- Press `Enter` to attach, `Esc` to cancel
149	
150	**Supported file path formats:**

{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}

{- | Event handling for the TUI application.

This module handles all user input and application events for the TUI.
During migration to the OS model, tool operations use the RuntimeBridge
which synchronizes tools between the legacy Runtime and OS Core.
-}
module System.Agents.TUI.Event where

 )

import System.Agents.AgentTree (OSAgentNode (..), osNodeTools)

 )
